creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
/usr/src/etc/pccard_ether refer old /etc/sysconfig.
This pccard_ether is obsoleted one.

Fix: New version of it refer /etc/rc.conf rather than sysconfig.
So I think good way is in current one.
It is included in  ftp://jaz.jp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-jp/PAO/PAO-970616.tar.gz

Or apply following Patch:
BEGIN>---<cut here>---


END>---<cut here>---
Thanks.--pTcqcLQdT5lmpxn2YtNx4yetexaykvxamNwXtpQTeNq5xkiF
Content-Type: text/plain; name="pccard_ether.patch.gz"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="pccard_ether.patch.gz"
